name: Storyblok
description: Monitor Storyblok headless CMS spaces for content management and team access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Storyblok at https://app.storyblok.com
2. Click your avatar → My Account
3. Go to Personal Access Tokens
4. Generate a new token and enter it below

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Storyblok → My Account → Personal Access Tokens

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Storyblok spaces for content infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Storyblok space collaborators and their content access roles
